望過founding partner profile
隨時個fund背後都係鄭家打骰

CLIFF ZHANG
FOUNDING PARTNER
Prior to founding Templewater, Cliff was the Senior Vice President at Chow Tai Fook Enterprises (CTFE), focusing on private equity transactions, global M&A and corporate development, deploying over US$5bn of capital during his 5 years with the firm.

Cliff was a director of Goshawk Aviation, Alinta Energy Ltd., and CTF Energy Ltd. Prior to CTFE, Cliff was with HSBC and Deutsche Bank investment banking division in Hong Kong.

Cliff is a SFC Licensed Representative for Regulated Activities Type 1, Type 4 and Type 9.
